description_long: This is a round wooden table with a smooth, polished surface and a rich brown finish. The tabletop is circular and appears to be made from a single piece of wood, with subtle wood grain patterns visible across its surface. The table is supported by three angled legs, each made of the same dark wood, converging at the center beneath the tabletop for stability. The legs are slightly tapered and splayed outward, giving the table a modern, minimalist appearance. There are no visible decorative elements, drawers, or additional features, emphasizing its functional and clean design. This table would be suitable for use in urban parks, outdoor cafes, or as street furniture.
description: A round, brown wooden table with a smooth surface and three splayed legs, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round tabletop and three angled legs, with the central leg most prominent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular tabletop and the outward splay of the legs, with the left leg more visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but with the right leg more prominent and the tabletop grain slightly more visible.
description_view_3: Side view mirroring view 1, with the right leg more visible and the tabletop's edge clearly defined.
